title: Strey
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image= |name=Strey |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] **[[Galactic Research Academy]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Greetings, Deputy Strey. DV-9 requesting access to raw data files. I have three researchers from offplanet with me.''"
"''Voice authorization confirmed. Go ahead.|DV-9 and Strey|''[[Galaxy of Fear: The Hunger]]''}} Deputy '''Strey''' was an Imperial clerk at the [[Galactic Research Academy]] on [[Koaan]]. He worked in the underground processing facility at the facility, and a consequence, he looked pale and sickly from too much time indoors. He had a sour demeanor. ==Biography== In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], Strey gave permission for [[DV-9]], a research assistant droid at the facility, to bring [[Mammon Hoole]] and his two wards into the facility. While they were there, he was shot by a group of [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]], including [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]], who were breaking into the facility to steal planetary data. The [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] was set to stun, knocking out Strey, and he only recovered after Okeefe, Hoole and all their companions had escaped the facility. ==Appearances== *''[[Galaxy of Fear: The Hunger]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Strey }} [[Category:Bureaucrats of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]]
